basic_details.job_title: VNIT Nagpur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Visvesvaraya National Institute of Technology Nagpur (VNIT Nagpur) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://vnit.ac.in/. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the VNIT Nagpur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 28 years. Age relaxation is relaxable up to 5 years in case of candidates belonging to scheduled castes/tribes/OBC, women and physically handicapped candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Physics from recognized universities/institutes with 55% marks and passing of NET-LS/GATE/ CSIR-UGC JRF examination
qualification.details: M.Sc. in Physics from recognized universities/institutes with 55% marks. Must have passed NET-LS/GATE/ CSIR-UGC JRF examination. Desired: relevant background in computational modelling.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for VNIT Nagpur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download VNIT Nagpur Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: VNIT Nagpur Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the VNIT Nagpur Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download VNIT Nagpur Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: VNIT Nagpur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
VNIT Nagpur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: M.Sc. in Physics from recognized universities/institutes with 55% marks. Must have passed NET-LS/GATE/ CSIR-UGC JRF examination. Desired: relevant background in computational modelling.

content_sections.heading: VNIT Nagpur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 28 years. Age relaxation is relaxable up to 5 years in case of candidates belonging to scheduled castes/tribes/OBC, women and physically handicapped candidates.

VNIT Nagpur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
VNIT Nagpur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for VNIT Nagpur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: VNIT Nagpur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the VNIT Nagpur Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the Junior Research Fellow position at VNIT Nagpur is 15th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. in Physics from a recognized university with at least 55% marks and have qualified the NET-LS/GATE/ CSIR-UGC JRF examination.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position is 28 years. Age relaxations are applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the VNIT Nagpur Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete application along with required documents to the specified email address before the deadline.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Does VNIT Nagpur offer any age relaxation for specific categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation of up to 5 years is provided for candidates belonging to scheduled castes/tribes/OBC, women, and physically handicapped individuals.

faq.question: Q9. What is the total number of vacancies for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow position at VNIT Nagpur.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section on this page. It contains all the detailed information.
